name: logistics coordinators for freight brokers processing 10–20 shipments/month tool
description: For logistics coordinators for freight brokers processing 10–20 shipments/month, delays in cargo shipments cause late orders. We provide real-time monitoring instead of manual tracking and communication with carriers.
target_audience: logistics coordinators for freight brokers processing 10–20 shipments/month
